subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Thee, O my God! How oft have I wanted to mention you with the words of the saints and praise you with the praise of those who have drawn nigh, despite knowing that every mention appearing from someone other than You will not reach you
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو الله العزیز المتعال. فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی حینئذ ارید ان اذکرک بذکر المقدسين واسبّحک بتسبيح المقربين مع علم بانّ کلّ ذکر الذي يظهر من عند غيرک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
